title: Create: Cafe Refabricated
description: Adds boba tea and iced coffee drinks that give the player potion effects.
body:
[![CircleCI](https://dl.circleci.com/status-badge/img/gh/toby7002/Create-Cafe-Refabricated/tree/1%2E18%2E2.svg?style=svg)](https://dl.circleci.com/status-badge/redirect/gh/toby7002/Create-Cafe-Refabricated/tree/1%2E18%2E2)

# Create: Cafe Refabricated

## About
Create: Cafe Refabricated adds Drinks like Boba Milk Tea and Coffee that use the Create mod machines to make.  
This is an unofficial fork of [Create Cafe](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-cafe) for Fabric.

## Contents

- This unofficial mod won't integrate with other mods like the official one does, so it has fewer items than the official version.
- Some available drinks: Apple Milk Tea, Pumpkin Milk Tea, Oreo Milk Tea, Sweet Berry Milk Tea, Iced Coffee, Iced Coffee with Milk.
